Name: NETWORK_MESSAGE_PARAM
Description: Defines network message and online interaction display categories for different multiplayer roles and phantom types.

Fields.Name: Host
Fields.Description: Messages or behavior related to the host player.

Fields.Name: White Phantom
Fields.Description: Messages associated with standard cooperative white phantoms.

Fields.Name: Small White Phantom
Fields.Description: Messages for smaller-scale or limited white phantom entities.

Fields.Name: Gold Phantom
Fields.Description: Messages for golden cooperative phantoms (special co-op roles).

Fields.Name: Small Gold Phantom
Fields.Description: Messages for smaller-scale gold phantom variants.

Fields.Name: Cooperative Blue Phantom
Fields.Description: Messages for friendly blue phantoms assisting the host.

Fields.Name: Bell Keeper Blue Phantom
Fields.Description: Messages for blue phantoms in competitive or retaliatory roles.

Fields.Name: Black Phantom (Summon Sign)
Fields.Description: Messages related to black phantom summon signs.

Fields.Name: Black Phantom (Invasion)
Fields.Description: Messages related to invading black phantoms.

Fields.Name: Red Phantom (Summon Sign)
Fields.Description: Messages related to red phantom summon signs.

Fields.Name: Red Phantom (Invasion)
Fields.Description: Messages related to invading red phantoms.

Fields.Name: Bell Keeper Phantom
Fields.Description: Messages for Bell Keeper covenant phantom activity.

Fields.Name: Rat King Phantom
Fields.Description: Messages for Rat King covenant phantom activity.

Fields.Name: Dragon Phantom
Fields.Description: Messages for dragon covenant phantoms.

Fields.Name: Mirror Knight Phantom (Summon Sign)
Fields.Description: Messages for Mirror Knight-related summon signs.

Fields.Name: Abyss Phantom (Summon Sign)
Fields.Description: Messages for Abyss covenant summon signs.

Fields.Name: Duel Blue Phantom
Fields.Description: Messages for blue duel-oriented phantom encounters.

Fields.Name: Duel Red Phantom
Fields.Description: Messages for red duel-oriented phantom encounters.

Fields.Name: Wandering Phantom
Fields.Description: Placeholder or system-used category for wandering ghost-like replays.

Fields.Name: Bonfire Phantom
Fields.Description: Placeholder or system-used category for bonfire-related ghost replays.

Fields.Name: Mirror Knight Phantom (Invasion)
Fields.Description: Messages for Mirror Knight invasion-type encounters.

Fields.Name: Abyss Phantom (Invasion)
Fields.Description: Messages for Abyss covenant invasion-type encounters.
